rss.title: AI videos of sexualised black women removed from TikTok after BBC investigation
rss.snippet: Dozens of Instagram and TikTok accounts have used AI avatars to promote explicit content, the BBC finds.

rss.title: Luke Littler applies to trademark his face to combat AI fakes
rss.snippet: The darts star's image has been used legally on darts merchandise, snacks and fashion brands.

rss.title: Hargreaves Lansdown says IT issues which affected thousands are over
rss.snippet: The finance firm has apologised for the disruption to its website and app, which has angered many customers.

arxiv_papers.title: Man and machine: artificial intelligence and judicial decision making
arxiv_papers.snippet: The integration of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies into judicial decision-making - particularly in pretrial, sentencing, and parole contexts - has generated substantial concerns about transparency, reliability, and accountability.
